import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut seen: List<String> = []
mut count = 0
let n = tokens.len()
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    mut found = false
    mut j = 0
    let m = seen.len()
    while j < m
      match seen.get(j)
      when Some(s)
        if s == tok
          found = true
        end
      when None
        found = found
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if not found
      seen = list_push_str(seen, tok)
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    count = count
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")

fn list_push_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ x: String) -> List<String>
  mut result: List<String> = [x]
  mut k = 0
  let len = xs.len()
  while k < len
    match xs.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      result = [v]
    when None
      result = result
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  result
end
